title: astragalus vescus
intro: Astragalus vescus, also known as the lesser milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the roots of Astragalus vescus have been used in herbal medicine to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The medicinal properties of this plant are believed to have adaptogenic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to improve overall health and resilience to stress. Astragalus vescus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it accessible for consumption and utilization in traditional medicine.
